title: selaginella pulvinata subsp. pulvinata
intro: Selaginella pulvinata subsp. pulvinata, also known as the pulvinate spikemoss, is a species of epiphytic, leathery-leaved plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella pulvinata subsp. pulvinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have various therapeutic effects, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
